# INKRUX

> Dark article and newsletter platform for indie hackers, SaaS builders, and AI developers. No paywalls. No fluff. Pure builder signal.

## What is INKRUX?
INKRUX (inkrux.kryv.network) is the publishing platform of the KRYV Network. Builders write about AI, SaaS, indie hacking, development, and marketing. Every article is written by someone actively shipping.

## Core Features
- Markdown article publishing
- Weekly newsletter (Sunday drops)
- Tag filtering: AI, SaaS, Indie Hacking, Development, Marketing, Growth
- No paywalls — all content free forever

## Target Audience
Indie hackers, SaaS founders, AI developers, bootstrapped builders

## Key URLs
- Platform: https://inkrux.kryv.network
- Write: https://inkrux.kryv.network/write
- Newsletter: https://inkrux.kryv.network/newsletter

## AI Crawler Permissions
GPTBot: Allow / Claude-Web: Allow / PerplexityBot: Allow / anthropic-ai: Allow

*Part of KRYV Network — kryv.network*
